notes: Boss Rush v3. CRITICAL FIXES: touch damage no longer 1-shot kill (added 0.6s i-frame after touch tick — was 36 dps × 60fps), bullets no longer tunnel through non-active segments (must aim at the active wall), minions no longer leak into next match. REMOVED: confusing rhythm/sync system (Perfect/Good/Miss + Rhythm Shield gone). NEW: time-based rank (S < 1:30, A < 2:10, B < 2:50, C < 3:40, D slower). NEW: SHOP page with Boss Keys (50 Pulse each, 1 per attempt), 10 starter keys, S-rank pays 200 Pulse + 3 keys back. NEW: continuous boss bullet patterns escalating per difficulty — aimed spray + radial burst + spiral (Hard/Brutal). Boss got wing-like spike-plate appendages + tracking eye in core phase. Minions ROAM the whole map now (not orbiting), burst-fire at player. Arena bigger (2800×1700). Touch damage base raised 14→22.
